title.rendered: [On Demand] Our 2025 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising Program 👩🏽‍💻

content.rendered: Our 2025 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising program is now available on demand! Customized for nonprofit professionals, the webinar series provides a timely, honest approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why human creativity is more valuable than ever.

excerpt.rendered: The 2025 Certificate in Social Media Marketing & Fundraising program covers the fundamentals of social media marketing and fundraising for your nonprofit. The certificate program provides an honest, practical approach to using social media at a time when organic reach and engagement are at an all-time low.
